#  Email Drawings (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' level permissions or higher on the project's Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool on your Android device with a network or Internet connection
  2. Tap the drawing you want to email.
  3. Tap the vertical ellipsis (⋮) button.  
  
![Drawings Android Drawing Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/766aa5d5a700ed6eeef775ec5d2ae00c/1da79d1ae9d8c856a3c442d0c2c4b46c/drawings-android-drawing-options-menu.png?fm=webp)  

  4. Tap **Email**.
  5. Fill out the email form to specify who will receive the document(s).
     * **To:** Tap the 'To' field to specify which contacts you want to receive the photo.
     * **Optional comments:** Tap to enter any additional comments you want to send with the photo.   
_Note:_ that the drawing's information and a link to the drawing will automatically appear in the email.
     * **Subject:** This field will be automatically populated with the drawing's information. You may tap this field to edit the subject
     * **Bcc:** Tap the 'BCC' field to enter in any email addresses you want to blind carbon copy on the email.
  6. Tap **Done**.
  7. Tap **Send**.


## See Also
  * [Drawings (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/permissions)
  * [Share Drawings Within Procore (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/share-drawings-within-procore-android)
  * [View Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/view-drawings-android)
title: Email Drawings (Android)
description: How to view multiple drawing areas in the drawing log of your Android mobile device.
